title: AI Celebrity Mugshot
description: Uses the default AI provider to stage a photo as a viral celebrity booking portrait.
positive_prompt: Famous celebrity arrest photo, luxury outfit, paparazzi flash lights, viral news atmosphere, realistic police booking portrait, height measurement wall, arrest placard, cinematic true crime documentary style, serious expression, highly detailed face, photorealistic, sharp focus
negative_prompt: cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, CGI, 3D render, blurry, low resolution, distorted face, deformed body, extra fingers, extra limbs, duplicate features, bad anatomy, watermark, logo, text overlays, smiling excessively, futuristic background, fantasy elements, pixelated, noise, artifacts
